creator: mike@fth-devel.net
text:
On Sat, 2 Nov 2013, Mark Felder wrote:

> Do you happen to have a link to a mirror that has the distfile? Thats 
> why the port was deprecated and the recommendation is to use net/gogoc. 
> If you want to be maintainer for this port it may be possible to arrange 
> that.

Sorry, there is no link to a mirror for the distfiles.  The port 
net/gateway6 can be easily replaced by net/gogoc.

Mike
